mcqs.stem: Which one of these is an output device?
Which of these is an input device?
Which of these is BOTH an input and output device?
Which of these is a storage device?
Which device lets you listen to music privately?
Which device would you use to turn a paper photo into a digital file?
Which type of application would you use to write a letter?
Which application would you use to create a slideshow?
Which type of application is best to add up a list of numbers automatically?
Which application do you open to visit a website?
Which type of application would you use to send a message with an attached file?
Which app would you open to do a quick sum like 47 × 8?

mcqs.context: Your friend has a visual impairment.
mcqs.stem: Which system setting should you apply to help your friend?
Which setting would you change to make the screen easier to see in bright sunlight?
Which setting would you change to make a video louder?
Which setting do you turn on to connect a wireless speaker?
Which setting should you turn ON during a flight to disable wireless connections?
Which setting helps people who find small text hard to read?
What is the best way to search for information about a film?
options: Enter the film title in a search engine
mcqs.answer: Enter the film title in a search engine

mcqs.stem: Which of these is a search engine?
Which search will give the most useful results about traveling to Paris by train?
Where can you go to find a website you visited yesterday but did not bookmark?
What is the best way to save a website so you can find it again quickly?
options: Take a photo of the screen

mcqs.stem: What do folders help you do on your computer?
Where can you save a file so you can open it on another device?
Which is the best file name for a CV you wrote in May 2026?
You delete a file by mistake. Where can you usually find it to restore?
What is the difference between Copy and Cut when moving a file?
options: Copy keeps the original; Cut removes the original
mcqs.answer: Copy keeps the original; Cut removes the original

mcqs.stem: Which file extension is typically used for a Word document?
Which file extension is for a picture?

mcqs.context: The music that you have downloaded to your smartphone is playing, but you cannot hear anything from the speakers.
mcqs.stem: Which action should you take?
options: Check headphones are not plugged in
mcqs.answer: Check headphones are not plugged in

mcqs.stem: An app on your phone has frozen. What should you try first?
Your laptop will not connect to the Wi-Fi at home. What is the FIRST thing to check?
options: That Wi-Fi is switched on and you have the password
mcqs.answer: That Wi-Fi is switched on and you have the password

mcqs.stem: Your printer says 'out of paper'. What should you do?
options: Add more paper to the tray
mcqs.answer: Add more paper to the tray

mcqs.stem: Your laptop battery shows 5%. What should you do to keep working?
What should you do regularly while typing a long document so you don't lose your work?
You accidentally delete a paragraph. Which command brings it back?
Which feature in a word processor helps you find spelling mistakes?
Which button do you use to make text BOLD?
Which feature lets you make a simple list with dots in front of each item?

mcqs.context: The image shows a video call.
mcqs.stem: Which icon should you click to send a message during the video call?
Which field hides recipients from each other when sending an email to many people?
Why is the subject line of an email important?
options: It tells the reader what the email is about
mcqs.answer: It tells the reader what the email is about

mcqs.stem: What does the 'Reply all' button do?
options: Sends your reply to everyone who received the original email
Forwards the email to your contacts
mcqs.answer: Sends your reply to everyone who received the original email

mcqs.stem: How do you send a file with an email?
options: Copy and paste the file into the To field
Put the filename in the subject

mcqs.stem: Which is the most appropriate greeting in an email to your tutor?
Which of these contributes to your digital footprint?
When is using lots of emojis usually NOT appropriate?
options: A friendly text to a friend

mcqs.stem: Which step is needed to buy something online?
options: Add the item to the basket and check out
mcqs.answer: Add the item to the basket and check out

mcqs.stem: Which of these helps a website check that a real person is filling in a form?
On a form, what does a red asterisk (*) next to a field usually mean?
options: The field is required and must be filled in
The field is in a foreign language
mcqs.answer: The field is required and must be filled in

mcqs.stem: After paying for something online, what should you keep as proof of purchase?

mcqs.context: The image shows a person's social media settings with email, date of birth, location, public post notifications and image gallery.
mcqs.stem: Which part of this image shows that this person has not protected their personal information?
What is a benefit of installing anti-virus software?
What should you do to reduce the effects of repetitive strain injury (RSI)?

mcqs.context: CAPTCHA is one type of verification check used in an online form.
mcqs.stem: What is another type of verification check?
options: The help feature on a form

mcqs.stem: Which of these should you NOT share online with people you don't know?
Which is the strongest password?
Why should you NOT share your password with friends?
options: They could access your account and your personal information
mcqs.answer: They could access your account and your personal information

mcqs.context: You receive an email saying you have won a prize. It asks you to click a link and enter your bank details.
mcqs.stem: What should you do?
options: Click the link and enter your details
Forward it to all your friends
Delete the email — it is likely a scam
mcqs.answer: Delete the email — it is likely a scam

mcqs.stem: Why is it important to install software updates?
What is a good habit to protect your eyes when working on a screen?
options: Take regular breaks and look away from the screen
mcqs.answer: Take regular breaks and look away from the screen

mcqs.stem: If someone is being unkind to you online, what is a sensible action?
options: Block them and tell a trusted adult
mcqs.answer: Block them and tell a trusted adult
